rule_text: Machine rates must be adopted for earthwork excavation in AP works where quantities exceed 1,000 cum, except for narrow-band canal/foundation works (lining seating 0.10-0.15m, silt removal <0.30m, restricted foundations, model sections/chutes).
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND ItemType=EarthworkExcavation AND Quantity>1000
verification_method: For tender BOQ: if earthwork item qty > 1000 cum, rate must be machine-rate (unless item matches one of the 5 listed exceptions)

rule_text: Administrative Approval for major/medium AP irrigation and R&B schemes must be granted in two stages: Stage-I (investigation, EIA/EMP, designs, clearances, land acquisition, R&R) and Stage-II (project prioritization + funding) — Stage-II approval requires Stage-I completion or certified bypass.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND Sector IN [Irrigation, RoadsBridges]
verification_method: Check AA file contains both Stage-I and Stage-II approval orders (or Engineer-in-Chief certification that Stage-I was bypassable)

rule_text: Technical Sanction monetary delegation in AP works: Executive Engineer up to Rs.10 lakh; Superintending Engineer up to Rs.50 lakh; Chief Engineer up to value of Administrative Approval.
verification_method: Check Technical Sanction officer rank matches delegation: EE <= Rs.10L, SE <= Rs.50L, CE up to AA value; reject if signed by lower-rank officer

rule_text: AP works must be inspected by departmental officials before Technical Sanction is accorded — by Executive Engineer (up to Rs.50 lakh), Superintending Engineer (Rs.50 lakh to <Rs.500 lakh), and Engineer-in-Chief/Chief Engineer (Rs.500 lakh and above).
verification_method: Check pre-TS inspection report on file by officer of correct rank-tier matching estimated cost band
